parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ requestId: $json.executionId + '-init', status: 'running', step: 'research', updatedAt: $json.updatedAt, source: 'n8n', payloadType: 'campaign_update' }) }}

={{ (function() { const cr = $('Code: Init Execution').first().json.criteria || {}; const kwParts = [].concat(Array.isArray(cr.industries) ? cr.industries : [], cr.keywords ? [cr.keywords] : []); return JSON.stringify({ page: 1, per_page: 25, person_titles: cr.jobTitles || [], person_locations: cr.geographies || [], q_organization_industry_tag_ids: cr.apolloIndustryIds || [], q_keywords: kwParts.join(' '), prospected_by_current_team: ['no'] }); })() }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ q: $json.companyName + ' ' + ($json.industry || '') + ' company funding news hiring', num: 5 }) }}

={{ (function() { const lead = $('Loop: Per Lead').item.json; const criteria = lead.criteria || {}; const serperResults = ($input.first().json.organic || []).slice(0, 3).map(r => r.title + ': ' + r.snippet).join('
'); const prompt = 'Score this lead 1-10 for fit against our ideal customer profile.

ICP Criteria:
- Industries: ' + (criteria.industries || []).join(', ') + '
- Geographies: ' + (criteria.geographies || []).join(', ') + '
- Job Titles: ' + (criteria.jobTitles || []).join(', ') + '
- Other: ' + (criteria.description || '') + '

Lead:
- Company: ' + lead.companyName + '
- Industry: ' + lead.industry + '
- Domain: ' + lead.domain + '
- Headcount: ' + lead.headcount + '
- Contact: ' + lead.personName + ' (' + lead.personTitle + ')

Recent signals:
' + serperResults + '

Respond with ONLY: Score: X/10. Reason: one sentence.'; return JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 80, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: prompt }] }); })() }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ requestId: $json.leadRequestId, payloadType: 'lead_create', source: 'n8n', updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), campaignId: $json.campaignId, name: $json.personName || $json.companyName, company: $json.companyName, website: $json.website, domain: $json.domain, industry: $json.industry, headcount: $json.headcount, fundingStage: $json.fundingStage, linkedinUrl: $json.linkedinUrl, contacts: [{ name: $json.personName, title: $json.personTitle, email: $json.personEmail, phone: $json.personPhone, source: 'apollo' }], enrichment: { apolloScore: $json.score, claudeReasoning: $json.reasoning, enrichedAt: new Date().toISOString() }, signals: [{ type: 'apollo_discovery', value: 'Found via Intelligence Campaign', strength: 'medium', at: new Date().toISOString() }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ requestId: $json.leadRequestId + '-link', payloadType: 'lead_update', source: 'n8n', updatedAt: new Date().toISOString(), campaignId: $json.campaignId, signals: [{ type: 'campaign_match', value: 'Matched by Intelligence Campaign (score: ' + $json.score + '/10)', strength: 'medium', at: new Date().toISOString() }] }) }}
